On this page On this page How it works Example Horizontal Multiple toggles and targets Accessibility CSS Sass variables Classes Usage Via data attributes Via JavaScript Options Methods Events ![ads via Carbon ](https://srv.carbonads.net/ads/click/x/GTND427UF6BIP2JJFT74YKQUCAAIL2JYCKYDPZ3JCAADTKQEC67DKKQKC6YDK5QYCWADKK3UCV7DT2JYCEADE53WHEYI5277CWBD4KJECTNCYBZ52K) What makes you click on a dev tool ad? Honest answers only. 3\ min survey. ads via Carbon How it worksLink to this section: How it works The collapse JavaScript plugin is used to show and hide content. Buttons or anchors are used as triggers that are mapped to specific elements you toggle. Collapsing an element will animate the height from its current value to 0 . Given how CSS handles animations, you cannot use padding on a .collapse element. Instead, use the class as an independent wrapping element. The animation effect of this component is dependent on the prefers\ reduced\ motion media query. See the reduced motion section of our accessibility documentation. ExampleLink to this section: Example Click the buttons below to show and hide another element via class changes: .collapse hides content .collapsing is applied during transitions .collapse.show shows content Generally, we recommend using a

On this page On this page How it works Example Horizontal Multiple toggles and targets Accessibility CSS Sass variables Classes Usage Via data attributes Via JavaScript Options Methods Events ![ads via Carbon ](https://srv.carbonads.net/ads/click/x/GTND427UF6BIP2JJFT74YKQUCAAIL2JYCKYDPZ3JCAADTKQEC67DKKQKC6YDK5QYCWADKK3UCV7DT2JYCEADE53WHEYI5277CWBD4KJECTNCYBZ52K) What makes you click on a dev tool ad? Honest answers only. 3\ min survey. ads via Carbon How it worksLink to this section: How it works The collapse JavaScript plugin is used to show and hide content. Buttons or anchors are used as triggers that are mapped to specific elements you toggle. Collapsing an element will animate the height from its current value to 0 . Given how CSS handles animations, you cannot use padding on a .collapse element. Instead, use the class as an independent wrapping element. The animation effect of this component is dependent on the prefers\ reduced\ motion media query. See the reduced motion section of our accessibility documentation. [ Position ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/utilities/position) - [ Shadows ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/utilities/shadows) - [ Sizing ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/utilities/sizing) - [ Spacing ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/utilities/spacing) - [ Text ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/utilities/text) - [ Vertical align ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/utilities/vertical-align) - [ Visibility ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/utilities/visibility) - [ Z\-index ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/utilities/z-index) - ** Extend ** - [ Approach ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/extend/approach) - [ Icons ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/extend/icons) - ** About ** - [ Overview ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/about/overview) - [ Team ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/about/team) - [ Brand ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/about/brand) - [ License ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/about/license) - [ Translations ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/about/translations) - - [ Migration ](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/migration/) [View on GitHub ](https://github.com/twbs/bootstrap/blob/v5.3.8/site/src/content/docs/components/collapse.mdx) # Collapse Toggle the visibility of content across your project with a few classes and our JavaScript plugins. On this page **On this page** --- - [How it works](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#how-it-works) - [Example](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#example) - [Horizontal](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#horizontal) - [Multiple toggles and targets](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#multiple-toggles-and-targets) - [Accessibility](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#accessibility) - [CSS](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#css) - [Sass variables](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#sass-variables) - [Classes](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#classes) - [Usage](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#usage) - [Via data attributes](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#via-data-attributes) - [Via JavaScript](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#via-javascript) - [Options](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#options) - [Methods](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#methods) - [Events](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#events) [![ads via Carbon](https://srv.carbonads.net/static/30242/6f3aed462da50f322292222cbc610ab73d6097ca) ](https://srv.carbonads.net/ads/click/x/GTND427UF6BIP2JJFT74YKQUCAAIL2JYCKYDPZ3JCAADTKQEC67DKKQKC6YDK5QYCWADKK3UCV7DT2JYCEADE53WHEYI5277CWBD4KJECTNCYBZ52K) [What makes you click on a dev tool ad? Honest answers only. 3\-min survey. ](https://srv.carbonads.net/ads/click/x/GTND427UF6BIP2JJFT74YKQUCAAIL2JYCKYDPZ3JCAADTKQEC67DKKQKC6YDK5QYCWADKK3UCV7DT2JYCEADE53WHEYI5277CWBD4KJECTNCYBZ52K) [ads via Carbon](http://carbonads.net/?utm_source=getbootstrapcom&utm_medium=ad_via_link&utm_campaign=in_unit&utm_term=carbon) ## How it works[Link to this section: How it works](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#how-it-works) The collapse JavaScript plugin is used to show and hide content. Buttons or anchors are used as triggers that are mapped to specific elements you toggle. Collapsing an element will animate the `height` from its current value to `0`. Given how CSS handles animations, you cannot use `padding` on a `.collapse` element. Instead, use the class as an independent wrapping element. The animation effect of this component is dependent on the `prefers\-reduced\-motion` media query. See the [reduced motion section of our accessibility documentation](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/getting-started/accessibility/#reduced-motion). ## Example[Link to this section: Example](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/collapse/#example) Click the buttons below to show and hide another element via class changes: - `.collapse` hides content - `.collapsing` is applied during transitions - `.collapse.show` shows content Generally, we recommend using a `<button>` with the `data\-bs\-target` attribute. While not recommended f
